title: ‘Didi vs. Modi’: A Test for the Hindu Right in India’s Bengali Heartland
summary_full: The party of Prime Minister Narendra Modi has been making gains in a state once beyond its grasp, but many decry an audit that removed nine million voters, many of them Muslim.
summary_public: The party of Prime Minister Narendra Modi has been making gains in a state once beyond its grasp, but many decry an audit that removed nine million voters, many of them Muslim.
